title: Property Consultant - Man Infraconstruction - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Man Infraconstruction - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Man Infraconstruction, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Patna operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Man Infraconstruction:
Man Infraconstruction is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Man Infraconstruction!
